text.title: Multi-Agent Pattern Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the workflow contain any irreversible action (DB writes, payments, deploys, external emails)?

conclusion.verdict: Primary pattern stays the one from the rest of the tree; ADD `hitl_gates` listing every irreversible action. HITL is overlay, not replacement.

branch.when: has_irreversible_action == false OR HITL_added == true AND needs_classifier_dispatch == true AND classifier_accuracy >= 0.85

conclusion.verdict: Pick `router`. Document classifier_accuracy; fall back to a generalist agent below threshold.

branch.when: has_irreversible_action == false OR HITL_added == true AND needs_classifier_dispatch == false OR classifier_accuracy < 0.85 AND shared_mutable_state == true

conclusion.verdict: Pick `blackboard`. Document concurrency_plan (single-writer queue / CRDT / DB transactions).

branch.when: has_irreversible_action == false OR HITL_added == true AND needs_classifier_dispatch == false OR classifier_accuracy < 0.85 AND shared_mutable_state == false AND needs_critique == true

conclusion.verdict: Pick `generator_critic`. Generator + critic on different model families; downstream impl = `multi-agent-conversational`.

branch.when: has_irreversible_action == false OR HITL_added == true AND needs_classifier_dispatch == false OR classifier_accuracy < 0.85 AND shared_mutable_state == false AND needs_critique == false AND needs_iteration == true

conclusion.verdict: Pick `loop`. Halting predicate required; downstream impl = `multi-agent-conversational` with `max_turns` cap.

branch.when: has_irreversible_action == false OR HITL_added == true AND needs_classifier_dispatch == false OR classifier_accuracy < 0.85 AND shared_mutable_state == false AND needs_critique == false AND needs_iteration == false AND parallelisable == true

conclusion.verdict: Pick `parallel_fanout`. Strong synthesizer at gather step (opus-grade); downstream impl = `multi-agent-basics`.

branch.when: has_irreversible_action == false OR HITL_added == true AND needs_classifier_dispatch == false OR classifier_accuracy < 0.85 AND shared_mutable_state == false AND needs_critique == false AND needs_iteration == false AND parallelisable == false AND needs_manager == true

conclusion.verdict: Pick `hierarchical`. Manager + stateless workers + synthesis; downstream impl = `multi-agent-hierarchical`.

branch.when: has_irreversible_action == false OR HITL_added == true AND needs_classifier_dispatch == false OR classifier_accuracy < 0.85 AND shared_mutable_state == false AND needs_critique == false AND needs_iteration == false AND parallelisable == false AND needs_manager == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
